emails.subject: First Energy Trading Services Inc.
emails.body: First Energy Trading Services Inc. Leslie, Theresa Mandola with EOL called and the referenced counterparty called her and is already trading gas with us and would like to start trading power online. I looked in my database and we have them shut down for power. Is this a counterparty we could open up for power or not?

emails.subject: First Energy Trading Services Inc.

emails.subject: Re: First Energy Trading Services Inc.
emails.body: Re: First Energy Trading Services Inc. They should be open for power. Leslie Tana Jones 08/23/2000 10:57 AM
